productDisplayName: Wrangler Men's Convertible Slub Purple T-shirt
description: CompositionPurple t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with front buttoned neck, collar with a button at the back, distressed print on left chest, branding on twill fabric strip on left arm, twill strips inside side cuts on the hem and comes with an extra buttonFittingcomfortWash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Wrangler t-shirts are a rage with the sporty, and this purple tee is a great way to celebrate the sportsman spirit of car racers. Made of cotton fabric, this tee will keep you dry and comfortable through all seasons, while the buttoned up neck on a placket along with a back button collar help hold the collar in place, giving you a smart look. Team this tee with denim pants or shorts and comfortable lifestyle footwear from the wide range available at myntra for those semi-formal and casual events.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
